query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(principal AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_principal,
  SUM(CAST(interest AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_interest,
  SUM(CAST(fee AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_fee,
  SUM(CAST(penalty AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_penalty,
  SUM(CAST(unlock_fee AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_unlock_fee,
  SUM(CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_overpaid,
  SUM(CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_bad_debt,
  SUM(CAST(discount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_discount,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_pt_amount,
  SUM(CAST(payment_tx_amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_tx_amount,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as bad_debt_rows
FROM debt_collected_cache

FROM debt_collected_cache
